description_long: This object is a rectangular, compact band-aid container with a glossy red exterior. Both of its broad faces display a prominent white circle with a red cross in the center, reminiscent of medical or first aid symbols. The container has slightly beveled edges and a smooth, seamless surface, giving it a modern and clean appearance. The sides are plain red, lacking any additional markings or features. The overall form is boxy but with softened corners, suggesting it is designed to be easily handled and portable. The object appears solid and sturdy, likely made from plastic, and is sized to fit comfortably in a hand or pocket.
description: A glossy red rectangular band-aid container with white medical cross symbols on its broad faces and smooth, beveled edges.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the plain red edge of the container, with no visible markings or features.
description_view_1: A broad face view displaying the white circle and red cross medical symbol centered on the glossy red surface.
description_view_2: Another narrow side view, identical to view 0, showing the plain red edge.
description_view_3: The opposite broad face, also featuring the white circle and red cross medical symbol on the red background.
attribute_packaging_design: The packaging is a rectangular, hard-shell container with a glossy red finish. Both main faces feature a large white circle with a red cross in the center, evoking a medical or first aid theme. The edges are beveled and the sides are plain red, with no visible text or additional graphics.
